title: QA ALIGN Assessment Report

executiveSummary.summary: This Playwright system is currently low trust. The correct starting point is to improve diagnosability, flake control, and state discipline before adding acceleration layers.

technicalFindings: Locator strategy is brittle and likely to create recurring false failures.
Evidence quality is not yet strong enough for first-pass diagnosis.
State ownership issues reduce confidence in parallel-safe execution.
roadmap: Start with Sprint 3 for artifact-first diagnosability.
Move to Sprint 4 to classify and reduce flake patterns.
Use Sprint 5 to restore state and data control.
Adopt Sprint 6 once the signal is stable enough to support clearer release decisions.
nextSteps: Run a technical signal review against the current suite.
Score anti-pattern concentration by severity and scope.
Confirm the no_ai path as the appropriate first modernization route.
